userMessage: 请先调用 spreadsheet.write，在 memory/generated/p2-spreadsheet-smoke.xlsx 里创建一个工作表，表头为 item, price, unit，写入两行：gold, 4755.44, usd/oz 和 silver, 31.2, usd/oz。然后继续调用 spreadsheet.read 回读这个文件，确认内容正确后把 path、sheetCount、第一张表前两行数据告诉我；如果还没完成，就继续调用工具直到真的完成。

{"action":"capability_call","taskStatus":"incomplete","responseText":"改用 Python 会话创建并回读表格。","capabilityRequest":{"capabilityKey":"shell.session","reason":"spreadsheet.write 绑定失败，改用本地 Python 创建 xlsx 并准备校验内容","requestedTier":"B1","timeoutMs":15000,"input":{"action":"start","command":"python3","args":["-i"],"cwd":".","yield_time_ms":500}}}{"action":"capability_call","taskStatus":"incomplete","responseText":"在 Python 会话里写入并读取工作簿。","capabilityRequest":{"capabilityKey":"shell.session","reason":"使用 Python 库创建 memory/generated/p2-spreadsheet-smoke.xlsx，并立即回读确认数据","requestedTier":"B1","timeoutMs":15000,"input":{"action":"write","sessionId":"$SESSION_ID","chars":"from openpyxl import Workbook, load_workbook
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('memory/generated/p2-spreadsheet-smoke.xlsx')

ws = wb.active
ws.append(['item','price','unit'])
ws.append(['gold',4755.44,'usd/oz'])
ws.append(['silver',31.2,'usd/oz'])
wb.save(p)
wb2 = load_workbook(p)
ws2 = wb2.worksheets[0]

{"action":"capability_call","taskStatus":"incomplete","responseText":"改用本地 Python 创建并校验表格。","capabilityRequest":{"capabilityKey":"shell.restricted","reason":"spreadsheet.write 绑定失败，改用本地 Python 生成 xlsx 并读取校验后继续完成用户要求","requestedTier":"B1","timeoutMs":15000,"input":{"command":"python3","args":["-c","from pathlib import Path
from openpyxl import Workbook, load_workbook
path = Path('memory/generated/p2-spreadsheet-smoke.xlsx')
path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = 'Sheet1'
ws.append(['item','price','unit'])
ws.append(['gold',4755.44,'usd/oz'])
ws.append(['silver',31.2,'usd/oz'])
wb.save(path)
wb2 = load_workbook(path, data_only=True)
ws2 = wb2.worksheets[0]
rows = [list(r) for r in ws2.iter_rows(min_row=2, max_row=3, values_only=True)]
print({'path': str(path), 'sheetCount': len(wb2.worksheets), 'rows': rows})"],"cwd":".","timeoutMs":15000}}}
